services.description: Provides API access to legacy LivingSocial vouchers for consumers, merchants, and CSRs.

services.name: voucher-inventory-jtier
services.title: voucher-inventory-jtier Documentation
services.description: Voucher Inventory Service V3 (VIS 3.0) — the next-generation inventory microservice built on JTier that provides real-time product inventory, pricing, and availability data for all Groupon consumer and merchant experiences.

services.name: voucher-inventory-service
services.title: Voucher Inventory Service Documentation
services.description: Manages the full voucher inventory lifecycle at Groupon -- from product configuration and unit reservation through redemption, refund, expiration, and reconciliation -- serving as the central source of truth for all voucher inventory state within the Continuum platform.

services.name: vouchercloud-idl
services.title: vouchercloud-idl Documentation
services.description: Multi-country discount and coupon API platform (Global Coupons Org) providing offer, merchant, user, rewards, and affiliate data to vouchercloud web and white-label partner surfaces across 18+ countries.

services.name: vss
services.title: VSS Documentation
services.description: VSS aggregates voucher and user data to power merchant-facing voucher search across Groupon's commerce platform.

services.name: watson-api
services.title: watson-api Documentation
services.description: Multi-component JTier Java service providing key-value storage, analytics counters, email freshness signals, recently-viewed deals, and Janus aggregation APIs for Groupon's Continuum platform.

services.name: watson-realtime
services.title: watson-realtime Documentation
services.description: Kafka Streams data writer jobs that process Janus events in real time and persist analytics counters, cookie mappings, deal view counts, realtime KV data, RVD aggregations, and user identities into Redis, Cassandra/Keyspaces, and PostgreSQL for downstream consumption by watson-api.

services.name: web-config
services.title: web-config Documentation
services.description: Generates and deploys nginx routing configuration from Mustache templates and YAML data files, and automates redirect-rule updates via Jira/GitHub workflows.

services.name: web-metrics
services.title: web-metrics Documentation
services.description: Kubernetes CronJob that collects CrUX (Chrome User Experience) and Lighthouse performance data from Google PageSpeed Insights for configured Groupon web pages and publishes results to Telegraf/Wavefront.

services.name: webbus
services.title: Webbus Documentation
services.description: A RESTful interface for publishing Salesforce-originated data changes to the Groupon Message Bus.

services.name: webhooks-service
services.title: webhooks-service Documentation
services.description: Receives GitHub Enterprise webhook events and executes configured automations for PR workflows, CI actions, Slack notifications, and Jira issue transitions.

services.name: wh-users-api
services.title: wh-users-api Documentation
services.description: REST API service that manages user, group, and resource entities for the Wolfhound CMS platform, backed by a PostgreSQL database and deployed on Kubernetes (GCP/AWS).

services.name: wishlist-service
services.title: Wishlist Service Documentation
services.description: JTier-based Java service that manages user wishlist lists and items across Groupon mobile and web surfaces, with background processing pipelines for expiry tracking, purchase state updates, and email/push notifications.

services.name: wolf-hound
services.title: wolf-hound Documentation
services.description: BFF web application for editorial page creation, template management, scheduling, publishing, and taxonomy operations within the Continuum platform.

services.name: wolfhound-api
services.title: wolfhound-api Documentation
services.description: SEO content management REST API for pages, templates, schedules, taxonomies, traffic, and mobile page payloads on the Continuum platform.

services.name: zendesk
services.title: Zendesk Documentation
services.description: Zendesk is Groupon's externally-hosted SaaS support platform, integrated by the Global Support Systems (GSS) team to manage customer support tickets and case operations across Groupon's commerce platform.

services.name: zombie-runner
services.title: Zombie Runner Documentation
services.description: Python-based ETL orchestration runtime that parses YAML workflow definitions, constructs directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), and executes task operators across data platform targets including Hive, Spark, Snowflake, Solr, Salesforce, and external REST services on Google Cloud Dataproc clusters.

services.name: zookeeper
services.title: ZooKeeper Documentation
services.description: Apache ZooKeeper is the distributed coordination service used by the Continuum Platform to provide configuration management, naming, distributed synchronization, and group services across all participating microservices and infrastructure components.
services.team: Apache ZooKeeper PMC (upstream); Continuum Platform team (operator)
